creator: Ville.Eerola@vehome.pp.sci.fi
text:
Daniel Hagan writes:
> This PR was closed by Kris, but the issue was reported as being resolved
> in 5.3.8 (as opposed to 5.3.0 in ports).  I upgraded the fetchmail port to
> 5.3.8 and dropped the patches that didn't appear to be necessary.  If the
> originator and maintainer would look over the upgrade, I'd appreciate it.

Thanks, but I have already submitted an upgrade for the fetchmail port
to version 5.3.8. I did intentionally submit a separate PR, whose
number is ports/18456.


Regards, Ville
